channel.title: (seeking greenlight/feedback) a mysterious entity
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "(seeking greenlight/feedback) a mysterious entity" - A somewhat humanoid entity that is just mysterious

item.title: Re: (seeking greenlight/feedback) a mysterious entity
item.content:encoded:
So, I also like writing mysterious things, but there's a tradeoff in SCP writing between mystery and storytelling: too much mystery and there's not enough story for people to care about. Mystery is only interesting if you've provided enough information that people will fill in the gaps that you left and get an interesting answer. (Which you implied, e.g, you need to have some idea wear that answer is when writing.)

I'm not really getting anything here beyond "ooooo, it's mysterious", and there's definitely not enough to make me care about filling in the gaps.

So, if you've got an idea for what the deal with THEM and the future is, go ahead and spell it out for us, and we can give you feedback on the idea and tell you how much you can afford to hide. If you don't have much of an idea there, then you really need to expand on that and come back, because without it this is almost nothing.

(The entity having a humorous personality isn't bad, but I can hardly say, "yeah, that'll be a great article" just from you saying that.)

item.title: (seeking greenlight/feedback) a mysterious entity
item.content:encoded:
Seeking Greenlights: Yes

Page Type: SCP Article

Genre: Mystery

Elevator Pitch: A mysterious female being with some anomalys about her like an undefinable age and a bad forecast for the future of humankind.

Central Narrative: The main database entry acts as a brief introduction and explanation to the viewer, the main narrative really happens in the interviews with the SCP. The main point of the story is the entity's forecast of THEM, which are never rally explained and leave room for interpretation.

Hook/Attention-Grabber: The entitys character. Especially in the interviews, the entity seems humorous and lively.
